# GitHub repository settings (SEO)

Set these on the repo **About** panel at [github.com/kingbeto/zebralabelprint](https://github.com/kingbeto/zebralabelprint) so GitHub search, Google, and people looking for **how to print labels on Mac with Zebra printers** can find the project.

## Description (max ~350 characters)

Primary (pick one, or shorten to fit):

```
How to print ZPL labels on Mac with Zebra thermal printers (ZD410, ZD620, GK420d). Free macOS app — CUPS driver, preview, partial print. Apple silicon.
```

Alternate:

```
Free Mac app to print Zebra label files (ZPL) on macOS via CUPS. ZD410/ZD620 support, live preview, shipping & barcode labels. No Windows needed.
```

## Topics

Add as many as GitHub allows (hyphenated, no spaces):

**Core**

`zebra` `zpl` `macos` `mac-os` `label-printing` `thermal-printer` `zebra-printer` `cups` `zpl-printing`

**Search intent / models**

`print-labels-mac` `zebra-mac` `zebra-macos` `how-to-print-labels` `barcode-labels` `shipping-labels` `warehouse-labels` `zd410` `zd620` `zd420` `gk420d` `zt410` `label-preview`

**Tech / audience**

`apple-silicon` `arm64` `swiftui` `open-source` `thermal-transfer` `zebra-zpl` `mac-printing`

## Website

Link to the latest release (good for “download” snippets):

```
https://github.com/kingbeto/zebralabelprint/releases/latest
```

## Release title and notes (Google snippets)

Use titles that match how people search, for example:

- `Zebra Label Print 1.2.0 — print ZPL labels on Mac (Apple silicon)`
- `Zebra Label Print for Mac — free Zebra thermal printer app`

Release notes should repeat (naturally, once each):

- print labels on Mac / macOS with Zebra printers
- ZPL files, CUPS, Zebra driver required
- ZD410, ZD620, GK420d and other CUPS queues
- preview, partial print, Apple silicon arm64

## CLI (if you use GitHub CLI)

```bash
gh repo edit kingbeto/zebralabelprint \
  --description "How to print ZPL labels on Mac with Zebra printers (ZD410, ZD620). Free macOS app — CUPS, preview, partial print. Apple silicon." \
  --homepage "https://github.com/kingbeto/zebralabelprint/releases/latest"

gh repo edit kingbeto/zebralabelprint \
  --add-topic zebra --add-topic zpl --add-topic macos --add-topic mac-os \
  --add-topic label-printing --add-topic thermal-printer --add-topic zebra-printer \
  --add-topic cups --add-topic zpl-printing --add-topic print-labels-mac \
  --add-topic zebra-mac --add-topic zebra-macos --add-topic barcode-labels \
  --add-topic shipping-labels --add-topic zd410 --add-topic zd620 --add-topic gk420d \
  --add-topic label-preview --add-topic apple-silicon --add-topic open-source \
  --add-topic swiftui --add-topic zebra-zpl
```

## README keywords to keep aligned

When editing [README.md](../README.md), keep these phrases present (in headings or natural prose) so the repo ranks for common queries:

| Query style | Where it appears |
|-------------|------------------|
| how to print labels on Mac with Zebra printers | H1, H2, FAQ |
| print ZPL on Mac / macOS | Intro, FAQ, step guide |
| Zebra printer Mac OS / macOS setup | Requirements, troubleshooting |
| Zebra thermal printer Mac | Intro, supported printers table |
| ZD410 / ZD620 / GK420d Mac | Supported printers, FAQ |
| Zebra CUPS driver macOS | Install steps (link to Zebra) |
| shipping labels / barcode labels Mac | Intro, FAQ |
| Zebra printer not printing Mac | FAQ troubleshooting |

Avoid keyword stuffing — one clear mention per section is enough.
